Localization.Description: Suspicious logon and build configuration changes in TeamCity. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} changed build configuration "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed build configuration "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed settings of VCS connector "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} changed settings of VCS connector "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
